backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the dairy business app implementing access control, user profiles, cattle management, delivery records, milk production/records, and customer management with full CRUD operations and reporting types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the task to restore the logo in Layout.tsx to its pre-Version-16 appearance, with high confidence and a single test requirement.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key fixes applied across hooks, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Query and TanStack Router with seven routes (dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports) all wrapped in the Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Controlled form component for adding or editing cattle records with fields for breed, age, daily milk production, health status (healthy/sick/recovered), purchase date, cost, notes, and active status.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Controlled form component for adding or editing customer records with name, address, phone, and an active status toggle shown only in edit mode.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A React form component supporting two modes: 'add' (full inventory item creation with name, category, quantity, unit, and threshold) and 'update' (quantity-only update for an existing item).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links, a main content area, and a footer for the AO Farms application.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Displays a Recharts bar chart of daily milk production totals for the past 7 days, derived from an array of MilkRecord objects with nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A dialog modal that previews and enables sending or copying a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for a given customer and delivery record.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Clipboard API that exposes a copy function, a copied state flag, and an error state with a configurable reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations (cattle, customers, milk records, deliveries, user profiles) along with time utility functions for nanosecond/Date conversions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm earthy farm-themed design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines a local TypeScript interface for InventoryItem used in frontend-only inventory tracking.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Page component for viewing, adding, and editing cattle records, displaying a stats summary and table with health badges and active/inactive toggling.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Page component for managing customers with add/edit dialogs, a stats summary, and a table of customer records with active status badges.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a hero banner, stat cards (active cattle, today's milk, missed deliveries), and a recent milk records table with a production chart.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Page component for logging and viewing daily milk delivery records, with a form to add deliveries, date-based filtering, summary stats, and a WhatsApp message modal for notifying customers.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Page component for managing farm inventory (feed, medicine, supplies) with local state, low-stock alerts, and dialogs for adding items or updating quantities.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Page component for logging and filtering daily milk yield records per cattle, displaying a production chart and a sortable table of records with total liters summary.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Page component that aggregates monthly delivery and milk production data, showing per-customer breakdowns, delivery boy performance stats, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility that generates and triggers a browser download of a CSV file containing a customer's monthly delivery records along with a summary section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Utility that formats a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message string and generates a wa.me deep-link URL for a given customer phone number and delivery details.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom theme extensions (fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius), and plugins including typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request to restore the logo in the Layout component (frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx) to its pre-Version-16 appearance, with one pending action item (AR-1).
